bio.name: Kevin Julio Pineda.
bio.body: systems engineer and frontend developer with a full-stack focus. I build modern web applications with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS.

headline.line2: applications with React, Next.js, and Tailwind,

about.body: I'm a systems engineer and frontend developer with a full-stack focus. I work on real applications integrating APIs, authentication, state management, validation, and experiences focused on performance, scalability, and usability.

experience.title: Recent experience
experience.description: Roles, stack, and context for each project. Ordered from most recent to oldest.

items.description: Development and maintenance of enterprise web applications with Next.js and TailwindCSS. Applying architecture best practices, design patterns, and maintainable code — integrating services, improving user experience, and optimizing internal processes in multidisciplinary agile teams.
First online sales channel for a hardware store with over 30 years of history. Custom Shopify theme built from scratch with Liquid and JavaScript, fully editable from the admin.
Headless fashion store with Remix + React + TypeScript, connected to Shopify via Storefront API in GraphQL. Authentication, filters, cart, and checkout with hybrid SSR + CSR rendering.
Official site and admin panel for a food brand. Remix + React + MySQL, with dynamic menu, branch management, and images served from Cloudflare Images.
Intelligent chatbot for managing medical appointments. Flask + SQLAlchemy + MySQL backend, with TensorFlow/Keras neural networks for intent classification and NLTK for natural language processing.

featured.description: I write about apps and sites I built end to end: the challenge, the stack I used, and what shipped in the end.

stack.description: Technologies I use regularly, grouped by area. Daily drivers, project-specific tools, and what I'm learning.

closer.body: Frontend, full-stack, or e-commerce. If you have a concrete idea or need an extra pair of hands, let's talk.
